tile_runtime_notes: TileType enum (TileGrid.ts) uses string keys T01–T20. LevelLoader maps legacy tile_01 format to the same enum.
AudioManager loads audio via resources.load('audio/bgm/<key>') and resources.load('audio/sfx/<key>') — no audio files found on disk; audio/ resource folder is absent.
Tile sprite lookup convention: runtime code should call resources.load('sprites/tiles/<tileId_snake>', SpriteFrame) — e.g. 'sprites/tiles/tile_01' for T01.
Chapter tile subdirectories (chapter1/ through chapter6/) exist but contain only .gitkeep — actual chapter-specific art not yet delivered.
20 generic tile PNGs exist at sprites/tiles/tile_01.png through tile_20.png — these are the current placeholder sprites consumed at runtime.
Special tile PNGs: special_bomb.png, special_light.png, special_wave.png, special_windmill.png exist at sprites/tiles/special/.
The tile-placeholder-spec.json defines per-tile filenames in subdirectories (e.g. chapter1/t01_wave_normal@2x.png) — these are the art delivery targets, not yet present.
GameScene.getTileNode() uses tileContainer.children[row * cols + col] — tile nodes are zero-indexed row-major.

normal.note: Default sprite frame. Loaded via resources.load('sprites/tiles/tile_XX', SpriteFrame).

highlighted.note: Applied programmatically at runtime via material property or color tint. No separate asset file required per placeholder-spec.

disappearing.fallback_tween: squash-collapse tween in GameScene.playTileDisappearAnim() — scale 1→1.3x0.7→0 over 0.30s then UIOpacity fade
disappearing.note: Animation component with clip 'tile-disappear' is preferred. Tween fallback fires when Animation component absent.

tile_sprite_loading_contract.description: How runtime code must load tile sprites — no hardcoded paths allowed in game logic

placeholder_policy: placeholder allowed for non-critical decorative art (island decor, NPC portraits in non-critical states); blocked for gameplay tiles (T01–T20 must have distinct color and silhouette even as placeholders — tile_01.png through tile_20.png currently satisfy minimum), obstacle sprites, and HUD elements

P0_blockers: Audio resource directory (game-client/assets/resources/audio/) is completely absent — all 22 audio bindings (SFX + BGM) will silently fail at runtime. AudioManager logs warnings but does not crash. Must be created before audio QA.
Chapter-specific tile art (chapter1/ through chapter6/ subdirectories) contains only .gitkeep — final art not delivered. Chapter-themed tiles will fall back to generic tile_XX.png placeholders.
Obstacle sprite assets (obstacle_ice_block, obstacle_weed, etc.) not found on disk — obstacle overlays cannot be rendered.
VFX frame sequences (tile-disappear, wave ripple, light-chain lightning) absent from resources/effects/frames/ — all VFX fall back to tween-based fallback in GameScene.
P1_blockers: Special tile badge art is partially present (4 files for 5 special types) — cascade borrows wave badge and pierce borrows windmill badge. Dedicated badges required.
AreaRestorationEffect ParticleSystem2D .effect file not confirmed on disk.
No Spine skeleton files found for special tile animations (bomb.skel, lightning.skel, etc.) — special tiles display static badge only.
P2_notes: Missing ui_icon_sheet@2x.png atlas — individual icon PNGs present but atlas not yet packed. Atlas required for optimal batching.
combo-popup Animation clip and tile-disappear Animation clip assumed to exist in Cocos Creator project but .anim files not found as standalone files in assets/ — must be embedded in scene or prefab.

validation_notes: DEGRADED: audio/ resource folder absent — all audio bindings (22 total: 14 SFX + 8 BGM) have no backing files on disk. AudioManager will log warnings at runtime.
DEGRADED: chapter tile subdirectories (chapter1/ through chapter6/) contain only .gitkeep — final illustrated tile art not yet delivered. Runtime will load generic tile_01–tile_20.png placeholders.
DEGRADED: obstacle overlay sprites not found — 7 obstacle types (ice_block, weed, wooden_crate, water_current, chain_lock, spreading_vine, spreading_moss) have no sprite files.
DEGRADED: VFX frame sequences absent (resources/effects/frames/ is empty) — tile disappear, wave ripple, light-chain lightning, pierce shimmer, cascade glow will all run tween fallbacks.
PASSED: 20 generic tile placeholder PNGs (tile_01.png–tile_20.png) confirmed present — gameplay is unblocked with placeholder tiles.
PASSED: 4 special tile badge PNGs confirmed (special_bomb.png, special_light.png, special_wave.png, special_windmill.png) — 5 special types covered at minimum (cascade shares wave badge).
PASSED: 14 background PNGs confirmed (ch01–ch06, before/after/sunset/overview variants).
PASSED: 15 NPC/character portrait PNGs confirmed (hinata + 4 NPCs × 3 emotions each).
PASSED: 30 UI icon PNGs confirmed in sprites/ui/ matching ui-asset-manifest.json.
PASSED: 35+ island zone stage PNGs confirmed (6 zones × 5 stages s0–s4).

PASSED: All TileType enum values (T01–T20), SpecialBlockType enum (5 types), ObstacleKind types (8 types), SFXKey enum (17 keys), and BGMKey enum (8 keys) confirmed from source code — all have runtime_id mappings in this contract.
PASSED: Audio loading path pattern confirmed from AudioManager.ts — BGM at 'audio/bgm/<key>', SFX at 'audio/sfx/<key>' via resources.load().
PASSED: Tile sprite loading path pattern confirmed — generic tiles at 'sprites/tiles/tile_XX' via resources.load().
NOTE: tile-placeholder-spec.json defines art delivery filenames (chapter1/t01_wave_normal@2x.png etc.) — these are the art handoff targets for the art team.
NOTE: 5 special tile code types (wave, light_chain, pierce, swap, cascade) map to only 4 badge sprite files — pierce→windmill and cascade→wave are temporary mappings requiring art delivery.
NOTE: No audio files were found anywhere in the repository (no .mp3/.ogg/.wav). Audio is the highest-priority missing asset category.
